enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Ninaithu Ninaithu expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting the emotional turmoil of the protagonist.

How does this song fit into the plot of 7G Rainbow Colony?

The song plays during a pivotal moment in the movie, highlighting the protagonist's romantic struggles and aspirations.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Shreya Ghoshal and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was this song released?

Ninaithu Ninaithu was released on May 21, 2004.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ninaithu Ninaithu, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions as he navigates the complexities of love. The song's soothing melody and poignant lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, perfectly capturing the essence of romance. As part of the film 7G Rainbow Colony, it serves as a backdrop to the character's emotional journey, making it a memorable piece. Shreya Ghoshal's captivating voice adds depth to the song, leaving listeners enchanted.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ninaithu Ninaithu from 7G Rainbow Colony is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Shreya Ghoshal's enchanting vocals, combined with Yuvan's soulful composition, create a magical experience for listeners. This song beautifully encapsulates the bittersweet emotions of romance, making it a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: Thinking of you, I will come close to you. I live because of you. Today, I look at you..
Before finishing what I started, I will take the message that comes to you, my dear.
I live because of you. Today, I look at you.
The shadows of trees that speak softly tell our story and time will say.
After blooming, will the flower's fragrance remain? Oh oh oh..
The sound of the bell that speaks of the past will tell everything. The color of the broken ring will come back..
In your hands, there are fingers that will bring heat.
Working hard to tell stories is not in our fate..
The first dream is enough, my love. The eyes will open..
All the words spoken will blend into your speech.
Will the world change? Will the form change?
All the moments that have passed will always be with you, day and night.
The shadow that came will bring happiness, coming and going.
Even if the lost time is there, I will return too.
What is this love in my youth? I live because of you.
Thinking of you, thinking of you..
